title: senecio lautus subsp. esperensis
intro: Senecio lautus subsp. esperensis, also known as the Senecio plant or Ragwort, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating various health issues. Some of the health benefits associated with Senecio lautus subsp. esperensis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are then used to harness its medicinal properties.
